roa.docketEntryComment: /AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3Y:PJ 164D/CTS:164 /WS/CTORD:1 YEAR HAMMAR IS LIFTED/ /CTORD:DEFENDANT PARTICIPATE FOR 1 YEAR IN WRAP AROUND PROJECT AS WELL AS REMAIN EMPLOYED/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING REQUIREMENT BE LIFTED/CTORD:FINES AND FEES BE SUSPENDED/X:RESTITUTION FROM 15025410 IS HARVEYWAIVED TO THIS PROBATION/SAORD/SA2:AREA BOUNDED BY SUNNYDALE AVE, SCHWEIN AVE, GENEVA AVE, BROOKDALE AVE,SANTOS ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134/REMA/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:12-12-19/PPRF//X:REMAINING CHARGES WILL BE DISMISSED AT SENTENCING/ARBUCKLE/DOP/OR/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION WITH A CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 7PM AND 5AM AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/987,2/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: GARY PRENETA/  /TWA/X: NO ENTRY OF PLEA/CAUSE/WEAP/WS/SAORD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF HERITAGE AVENUE AND REY STREETS, SF/ORNAS//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT MAY BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
